title: 2026 Makeup and Hairstyling Oscar Analysis
text: Frankenstein claimed the award with the team of Mike Hill, Jordan Samuel, and Cliona Furey taking home the statuette. The category featured five competitors: Frankenstein (Winner), Kokuho with Kyoko Toyokawa, Naomi Hibino, and Tadashi Nishimatsu, Sinners with Ken Diaz, Mike Fontaine, and Shunika Terry, The Smashing Machine with Kazu Hiro, Glen Griffen, and Bojoern Rehbein, and The Ugly Stepsister with Thomas Foldberg and Anna Cathrine Saurberg. The publication described the category as stacked, indicating strong competition across diverse projects ranging from a creature transformation to historical drama and contemporary films. Frankenstein achieved significance by executing a rare sweep of multiple craft categories at the 2026 ceremony.
